insights: The market has stabilized above the 30-day average of 986, showing a consistent upward trend in the final week of the data set.
Growth is currently led by FAANG+ and Unicorn tiers, suggesting that larger, well-funded companies are driving the recent hiring momentum.
The 7-day average (996) being higher than the 30-day average (986) indicates a strengthening hiring environment heading into the next month.
